doc_layout.repo_security: docs/repo/security/skill.md — documents PATCH /settings and GET .../logs endpoints for GitHub repo security features and job logs

conventions.changelog_fragments: One .md file per change under changelog.d/ with suffix .misc.md for non-feature/fix entries
conventions.reaction_turns: Fire-and-forget background asyncio tasks scheduled via _schedule_reaction(), serialised with user turns via RunSerializer lock, depth-bounded at max 3 (_MAX_REACTION_DEPTH) to prevent unbounded trigger chains. Passive record fallback when cap is reached or agent not wired.
conventions.test_pattern: Reaction-turn tests must await background tasks via _await_reaction_tasks() helper that gathers all in-flight _reaction_tasks.
